metrics.name: Senior Developer Time Savings
metrics.calculation_method: Survey of senior developers (5+ years experience) comparing weekly review time before and after CodePilot adoption
assumptions: Does not account for review quality changes
metrics.notes: Range: 2-8 hours/week depending on team size and PR volume

metrics.name: Review Cycle Time Reduction
metrics.calculation_method: Median reduction in time from PR open to merge, comparing 90 days pre-CodePilot to 90 days post-adoption
assumptions: No major process changes during period

metrics.name: Cost per Review Reduction
metrics.calculation_method: Estimated developer hourly cost × review time, before vs after CodePilot
assumptions: Does not include CodePilot subscription cost
Assumes time savings translate to productive work
metrics.notes: Net ROI positive after ~2 months for most teams

rules: ROI claims must include calculation methodology on request
Assumptions must be disclosed in detailed contexts
Time-based claims need sample period specified
